model_families.label: Frontier / Flagship
model_families.description: State-of-the-art reasoning. Best for complex research, agent workflows.

model_families.label: Advanced / Workhorse
model_families.description: Strong capability, production-grade balance of cost and quality.

model_families.label: Efficient / Mid-tier
model_families.description: Faster and cheaper; good for most everyday tasks.

model_families.label: Budget / Speed
model_families.description: Lowest cost, highest throughput; simple tasks, high volume.

model_families.label: Reasoning / Thinking
model_families.description: Dedicated chain-of-thought models with thinking budgets.
